feed.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM RD-RIV-E-D1.

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.55.1
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.55.1

Part: RIVAL RD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.54.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.54.0

Part: RIVAL RD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. -This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-09

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: RIVAL RD

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.49.6
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.49.6

Part: RIVAL RD

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. FW 2.49.6 contains improvements in the support and verification of the Firmware during the factory production of the Rear Derailleur.

Released: 2024-10-05

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.49.4
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.49.4

Part: RIVAL RD

Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates, and reliability improvements

Released: 2024-08-14

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: RIVAL RD

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.48.2
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.48.2

Platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2024-04-19

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.46.5
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.46.5

Part: RIVAL RD

Platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2023-10-03

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.41.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.41.0

Part: RIVAL RD

General bug fixes and reliability improvements. General improvements to Ant+ gear position and battery status reporting.

Released: 2022-12-14

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.32.0
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.32.0

Part: RIVAL RD

- Improve connection reliability with the AXS App and third-party head units. - Idle time before component enters sleep-mode increased to 5 minutes. - New Configure Controls logic allows available shift/actuation actions to be assigned in any arrangement. - Bug Fix - Mismatched road controller upshift/downshift settings are no longer reset when the derailleur/seat post battery is removed. - Bug Fix - Resolved conditions where sequential shift could come out of sequence unexpectedly.

Released: 2022-02-09

entry.title: RIVAL RD MAX 36T (RD-RIV-E-D1) — firmware 2.7.6
entry.summary:
RIVAL RD MAX 36T RD-RIV-E-D1 — firmware 2.7.6

Part: RIVAL RD

Additional product support.

Released: 2021-05-15
